title: polemoniaceae
intro: The polemoniaceae rank refers to a family of flowering plants. It is a taxonomical group that comprises approximately 95 genera and over 2,000 species of plants. The members of this family are commonly known as phlox, or Jacob's ladder, and are found throughout the Northern Hemisphere, with a majority of species native to North America. Many species within this family are valued for their attractive flowers and are often used in ornamental landscaping and gardening.
